rulings.Case Title: STEVEN F GREENWALD et al VS. STEVEN A MINISINI et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 25, 2017, line 1. PLAINTIFFS STEVEN GREENWALD, ROCHELLE ALPERT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Additionally there are triable issues of fact regarding existence of equitable easement and facts listed in Defendant's Separate Statement of Additional Facts. (See Plaintiff's Response to Defendant's Separate Statement). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER GARCIA VS. DAVID O' KEEFFE AND KARI O'KEEFFE, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance Of Plaintiff Alexander Garcia At Deposition And The Production Of Documents, And For Monetary And/Or Evidentiary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Daniel Berko In Support Of Motion

rulings.Case Title: KINSON WONG VS. JOE LING ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 25, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANTS THOMAS WONG, C.K. KWAN, EDMOND HON, 633 PARTNERSHIP, 633 HOLDINGS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer.
